flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Prescott College fell 43% between 2021 and 2024 (383 → 219).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 36% at Prescott College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (253 vs 394).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Prescott College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (35.9% vs 43.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Prescott College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
